requirement.title: REQ-1690
requirement.requirement: Lifetime assurance test of 2 cells (with regard to highest possible deloading current) under the following conditions (Test Number equal az1, Art equal cyclic, Deloading Current equal 15,5C, Mean Energy Level equal 31Wh (55%-SOC EOL), Energy deloaded per cycle equal 50,8Wh (90%-SOC EOL) ,Current Pulse time equal 20 seconds, Current break time equal as short as possible (depending on temperature regeneration), Daily operational time equal 4,5h)
